Welcome. We're glad you're here. Allow me to introduce you to Brandon Voss. Brandon Voss is the director of operations of the Black Swan Group. I know what you're thinking. Same last name. They look so much alike. Gotta be father and son, right? Actually, we are. Not only is Brandon Voss the director of operations of the Black Swan Group, in reality, he's the uncredited co-author of Never Split the Difference. And he's a Black Swan Group's chief negotiation officer. He cuts all our deals. He's been involved every step of the way in adapting hostage negotiation into the business world and the writing of the book. Actually, he started learning this stuff when he was about two years old. So he's good at it. He's very insightful, and you'll enjoy his instruction. Thanks, Dad. I appreciate that. It's an honor to be part of the Black Swan Group and a part of this coursework. And I'll see you inside.
